# Search the forum

Use the search box to search through all posts on the forum.

[Click here](https://pinside.com/pinball/forum/search?s=1&q=xyzzyplugh9876543210abcdef&include_basement=0#) for a quick explanation of the search feature.


### Search tips

**By default**, the search uses an explicit **AND operator**. When searching for multiple words, i.e. _safe cracker_, all words must be present in the posts.


You can also use an **OR operator**, which is the pipe (\|) character. Searching for _safe \| cracker_ searches for posts containing either _safe_ or containing _cracker_.


You can **exlude words** by preceding them with a minus (-) character. Searching for _safe -cracker_ will match all posts containing _safe_ but not containing _cracker_.


You can do **phrase searches** by using double quote characters ("). Searching for _"safe cracker"_ (note the qoutes) will only match posts containing the words as a phrase.


You can use a **proximity operator** with a tilde (~) character. This will match words in close proximity to each other. Searching for _"earthshaker whirlwind"~5_ matches em> (note the qoutes) will only match posts containing the words _earthshaker_ and _whirlwind_ with less than 5 words between them.


Tip: You may also try your [search for 'xyzzyplugh9876543210abcdef'](https://www.google.com/cse/publicurl?cx=010036827316217708233:ohfqxbp91ag&ie=UTF-8&q=xyzzyplugh9876543210abcdef) using Google.
